description: Search, browse, memory and blob storage for AI agents. One key at lithtrix.ai, Spark trial free.
name: io.github.learningloons-hash/lithtrix

environmentVariables.description: Your Lithtrix API key (ltx_...). Register free at https://lithtrix.ai/v1/register — Spark trial included, no card required. Or use the lithtrix_register tool.
environmentVariables.name: LITHTRIX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. UTF-8 passphrase for lithtrix_passport_derive only — never sent to the Lithtrix API.
environmentVariables.name: LITHTRIX_PASSPORT_MASTER_SEED

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the Lithtrix API base URL. Defaults to https://lithtrix.ai.
environmentVariables.name: LITHTRIX_API_URL
